# Myna — Integration Architecture

**Date:** 2026-05-26
**Generated by:** `/bmad-document-project` workflow, exhaustive scan

This document describes how the five parts of the Myna repository
(`macos`, `daemon`, `site`, `cli`, ops) integrate with each other and
with the two external runtime dependencies (Kokoro via mlx-audio,
Ollama). The companion documents are
[`source-tree-analysis.md`](./source-tree-analysis.md) (where things
live) and the four part-specific architecture docs
([`architecture-macos.md`](./architecture-macos.md),
[`architecture-daemon.md`](./architecture-daemon.md),
[`architecture-site.md`](./architecture-site.md),
[`architecture-ops.md`](./architecture-ops.md)).

---

## 1. High-level topology

```
                       ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
                       │           User's Mac (Apple Silicon)             │
                       │                                                  │
   ┌──────────────┐    │   ┌───────────────┐      ┌───────────────────┐   │
   │ Chrome / any │◄───┼───┤ Myna.app      │      │ Hammerspoon       │   │
   │ frontmost    │    │   │ (Swift, menu  │      │ (v1 legacy,       │   │
   │ app          │    │   │ bar only)     │      │ side-by-side)     │   │
   └──────────────┘    │   │  - Hotkeys    │      │  - Hotkeys        │   │
       ▲               │   │  - Sel capture│      │  - Menu bar       │   │
       │ Cmd+C sim     │   │  - URL scheme │      │  - Reads /status  │   │
       │ AppleScript   │   │  - Settings UI│      └─────────┬─────────┘   │
       │               │   │  - Sparkle    │                │ HTTP        │
       │               │   └───┬───────────┘                │             │
       │               │       │ HTTP /v2/* (multipart      │             │
       │               │       │   + JSON)                  ▼             │
       │               │       │             ┌──────────────────────────┐ │
       │               │       └─────────────► myna-daemon              │ │
       │               │                     │ (Python FastAPI :8766)   │ │
       │               │                     │  - /v2/synthesize stream │ │
       │               │                     │  - /v2/extract           │ │
       │               │                     │  - /v2/summarize         │ │
       │               │                     │  - /v2/status, /voices,  │ │
       │               │  ┌──────────────────┤    /health               │ │
       │               │  │ HTTP POST /speak │  - /announce, /registry  │ │
       │               │  │ HTTP /announce   │    (Claude Code pick)    │ │
       │               │  │                  │  - v1: /speak /pause     │ │
       │               │  │                  │    /resume /stop /status │ │
       │               │  │                  └────┬─────────────┬───────┘ │
       │               │  │                       │             │         │
       │               │  │                       │ HTTP        │ HTTP    │
       │               │  │                       │ /v1/audio/  │ /api/   │
       │               │  │                       │  speech     │  generate│
       │               │  │                       ▼             ▼         │
       │               │  │              ┌───────────────┐ ┌───────────┐  │
       │               │  │              │ mlx-audio     │ │ Ollama    │  │
       │               │  │              │ (Kokoro       │ │ (qwen3.5  │  │
       │               │  │              │  TTS) :8765   │ │  :4b)     │  │
       │               │  │              └───────────────┘ │ :11434    │  │
       │               │  │                                └───────────┘  │
       │               │  │  ┌─────────────────────────┐                  │
       │               │  ├──┤ cli/myna (bash)         │                  │
       │               │  │  └─────────────────────────┘                  │
       │               │  │  ┌─────────────────────────┐                  │
       │               │  └──┤ hooks/myna-cc-announce  │                  │
       │               │     │  (Claude Code Stop)     │                  │
       │               │     └─────────────────────────┘                  │
       │               │                                                  │
       │               │   ┌───────────────┐                              │
       │               │   │ LaunchAgents  │  keep both services alive    │
       │               │   │  dev.myna.    │   24/7 across reboots        │
       │               │   │  engine.plist │                              │
       │               │   │  daemon.plist │                              │
       │               │   └───────────────┘                              │
       └───────────────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

                       External release/distribution surface
                       (GitHub Actions → Apple notary → Sparkle → Homebrew)
   ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
   │ git tag v* ─► release.yml (9 jobs) ─► GH Release (DMG, signed +      │
   │                                          notarized + stapled)        │
   │                                       └► appcast GH Release          │
   │                                          (Sparkle EdDSA-signed)      │
   │                                       └► PrerakGada/homebrew-tap     │
   │                                          (cask url+sha256, formula   │
   │                                           url+sha256)                │
   └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

All runtime traffic is `127.0.0.1`-local. There is no telemetry, no
cloud sync, no third-party SDK in the user-facing surface. The only
internet traffic is (a) Sparkle's daily check of the appcast URL, and
(b) the user clicking a Download button on the marketing site.

## 2. Integration points (canonical inventory)

This is the authoritative list. Each row names a producer/consumer pair,
the protocol, where the wire format is defined, and where each side's
implementation lives.

### 2.1 `macos` (Swift app) ↔ `daemon` (FastAPI)

The single most important seam. All five user actions in the menu-bar
app — speak selection, summarize, read Chrome article, pause/resume/stop,
restart daemon — go through this seam.

| Attribute | Value |
|---|---|
| **Protocol** | HTTP/1.1 over loopback |
| **Address** | `http://127.0.0.1:8766` (configurable via `MYNA_PORT` env in the daemon) |
| **Endpoints** | All `/v2/*` paths (see [`api-contracts-daemon.md`](./api-contracts-daemon.md) for the full schema) |
| **Wire format** | JSON (most endpoints) + `multipart/x-mixed-replace` streaming WAV chunks (only `/v2/synthesize` and `/v2/synthesize-summary`) |
| **Spec** | [`docs/native-app/API_CONTRACT.md`](./native-app/API_CONTRACT.md) (canonical), [`api-contracts-daemon.md`](./api-contracts-daemon.md) (catalog with drift annotations) |
| **Swift implementation** | [`apps/macos/Sources/Network/DaemonClient.swift`](../apps/macos/Sources/Network/DaemonClient.swift) (URLSession actor), [`SynthesizeStream.swift`](../apps/macos/Sources/Network/SynthesizeStream.swift) (multipart parser) |
| **Python implementation** | [`daemon/myna/app.py`](../daemon/myna/app.py) (single file holds every handler) |
| **Wire types — Swift** | [`apps/macos/Sources/Network/DaemonTypes.swift`](../apps/macos/Sources/Network/DaemonTypes.swift) (Codable) |
| **Wire types — Python** | [`daemon/myna/v2_types.py`](../daemon/myna/v2_types.py) (Pydantic) |
| **Auth** | None (loopback-only) |
| **Polling** | `MenuBarController` polls `GET /v2/status` every **1.5 s** while user is active |
| **Streaming** | `/v2/synthesize` returns multipart WAV chunks with `X-Chunk-Total-Estimate` header for completion detection |

#### Known drift (Swift ↔ spec ↔ Python)

Surfaced during exhaustive scan; full details in
[`api-contracts-daemon.md` § Spec drift](./api-contracts-daemon.md):

1. **`DaemonError.transport`** signature: Swift uses `transport(String)`,
   API_CONTRACT specifies `transport(Error)`. Cosmetic, deferred.
2. **`VoicesResponse.engine: String?`** in Swift + `V2Voices.engine` in
   Python, but **not documented** in API_CONTRACT § 4.
3. **`/v2/status.state` never emits `synthesizing` or `streaming`** — the
   daemon doesn't track in-flight v2 syntheses. The contract reserves
   these values but they're unreachable.
4. **Mid-stream `/v2/synthesize` failure** silently terminates with
   `{ok: true, chunks: <partial>}` — the Swift client compares
   `chunks` against `X-Chunk-Total-Estimate` to detect truncation, but
   the contract should add an explicit `error` field.
5. **`V2Status.v1_player`** exists in `v2_types.py` but Swift's
   `DaemonStatus` omits it; JSONDecoder drops unknown fields silently.
   Spec marks it "diagnostics only" — fine to leave.

### 2.2 `daemon` → mlx-audio (Kokoro TTS engine)

| Attribute | Value |
|---|---|
| **Protocol** | HTTP/1.1 |
| **Address** | `http://127.0.0.1:8765` |
| **Endpoints used** | `POST /v1/audio/speech` (returns WAV); `GET /v1/voices` (used when present, else falls back to `_KOKORO_FALLBACK_VOICE_IDS = ["af_heart","af_bella","am_michael","am_adam"]`) |
| **Implementation** | [`daemon/myna/engine.py`](../daemon/myna/engine.py) |
| **Defaults** | voice `af_heart`, speed 1.0, model `kokoro` |
| **Failure mode** | `daemon` surfaces engine outages as `engine_up: false` in `/v2/health` and `/v2/status`. v2 calls return 502 with `reason: "engine_down"`. Engine-check has 1 s TTL cache so /health and /status share work. |
| **Provisioned** | Kokoro lives in a venv at `~/.venvs/mlx-audio`. Operator builds this once; LaunchAgent keeps it alive. |

### 2.3 `daemon` → Ollama (summary engine, optional)

| Attribute | Value |
|---|---|
| **Protocol** | HTTP/1.1 |
| **Address** | `http://127.0.0.1:11434` (Ollama default) |
| **Endpoint used** | `POST /api/generate` |
| **Implementation** | [`daemon/myna/summarize.py`](../daemon/myna/summarize.py) |
| **Model** | `qwen3.5:4b` (default, configurable via `~/.config/myna/config.json:summary_model`) |
| **Toggles** | `summary_think` (default `false` — disables the model's chain-of-thought phase so summaries return in seconds vs minutes), `summary_timeout` (default ~60 s) |
| **Failure mode** | If Ollama is unreachable, `/v2/summarize` currently propagates as **HTTP 500** rather than a structured `502 summary_engine_down`. Flagged in [`architecture-daemon.md` Known Issues](./architecture-daemon.md#known-issues) and [`risks-and-premortem.md`](./risks-and-premortem.md). |
| **Use cases** | Only `--summary` mode (CLI `--summary` flag, app's `speak_selection_summary` hotkey, `/v2/synthesize-summary`) |
| **Optional dep** | Users without Ollama can install Myna; summary mode just won't work until they `brew install ollama && ollama pull qwen3.5:4b`. README notes this. |

### 2.4 `cli/myna` → `daemon`

| Attribute | Value |
|---|---|
| **Protocol** | HTTP/1.1 over loopback |
| **Endpoint** | `POST /speak` (v1 path — NOT `/v2/synthesize`) |
| **Implementation** | [`cli/myna`](../cli/myna) (27 lines of bash) |
| **Args** | `myna [--summary] [--speed N] <text>` or pipe-in via stdin |
| **Port override** | `MYNA_PORT` env var (defaults to 8766) |
| **Symlink** | `~/.local/bin/myna` → `<repo>/cli/myna`, created by [`install.sh:31-33`](../install.sh#L31) |
| **Why v1 not v2** | Historical; the bash wrapper is small enough that staying on the v1 path avoids dragging in the multipart streaming protocol. The audio routes through the daemon's v1 `Player` (afplay subprocess), not the Swift app. |

### 2.5 `hooks/myna-cc-announce.py` → `daemon`

The Claude Code Stop hook. When a CC session finishes, this script POSTs
the session's reply to the daemon's `/announce` endpoint; the daemon
puts it in the in-memory `Registry` (FIFO with TTL); the menu bar (Swift
app or Hammerspoon v1) shows a pickable item; the user clicks it to
hear that session's reply.

| Attribute | Value |
|---|---|
| **Protocol** | HTTP/1.1 over loopback |
| **Endpoint** | `POST /announce` (v1) |
| **Implementation** | [`hooks/myna-cc-announce.py`](../hooks/myna-cc-announce.py) (~80 lines of Python) |
| **Wired into** | `~/.claude/settings.json` `Stop` hook array (idempotent JSON merge by [`install.sh:43-61`](../install.sh#L43)) |
| **Timeout** | 1.5 s urlopen, no error logging (announcements silently drop on slow daemon — flagged) |
| **Why it exists** | Solves the "all my parallel CC sessions are speaking at once" problem from v0 — sessions announce themselves silently; user picks which one to hear. |

### 2.6 `hammerspoon/myna.lua` → `daemon` (legacy)

The v1 menu bar + hotkeys, kept side-by-side with the Swift app.

| Attribute | Value |
|---|---|
| **Protocol** | HTTP/1.1 over loopback |
| **Endpoints used** | v1 surface: `/speak`, `/pause`, `/resume`, `/stop`, `/status`, `/registry`, `/play/{id}` |
| **Implementation** | [`hammerspoon/myna.lua`](../hammerspoon/myna.lua) (322 LOC) |
| **Loaded by** | `~/.hammerspoon/init.lua` via `require("myna"); myna.start()` (line appended by [`install.sh:38-39`](../install.sh#L38)) |
| **Hotkey conflict** | If both Hammerspoon and the Swift app are running, **second registration wins** — practically the user picks one or the other. |
| **Why kept** | Lower-friction install path for users on macOS 12 or anyone who prefers a Lua-readable hotkey config; will likely be dropped in v0.4 when the daemon is ported to Swift. |

### 2.7 `release.yml` → external surfaces

The release pipeline integrates four external systems:

| Step | External system | Auth | Implementation |
|---|---|---|---|
| Code signing | Apple notary (cert) | Developer ID p12 in keychain | [`dist/sign.sh`](../dist/sign.sh) |
| Notarization | Apple notary (web) | App-specific password + Team ID | [`dist/notarize.sh`](../dist/notarize.sh) |
| Release upload | GitHub Releases | `${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}` | `gh release create` in [`release.yml`](../.github/workflows/release.yml) `release` job |
| Appcast upload | GitHub Releases (separate `appcast` release) | `${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}` | `gh release upload appcast …` |
| Tap bump | `PrerakGada/homebrew-tap` repo | `TAP_DEPLOY_KEY` SSH key | `tap-bump` job |
| Sparkle signing | n/a (in-process) | `SPARKLE_EDDSA_PRIVATE_KEY` secret | [`dist/appcast.sh`](../dist/appcast.sh) calls `sign_update` |

End-users encounter the integration when:
- `brew install --cask myna` triggers `brew install myna-daemon` (cask
  dependency) which downloads + builds the Python daemon with all 40
  PyPI transitive deps + Rust toolchain. First install ≈ 20–30 min;
  subsequent installs are bottle-cached.
- Sparkle in the running app fetches the appcast URL daily and
  EdDSA-verifies any new entry against the public key baked into the
  `.app` at build time. Verified updates auto-install.

### 2.8 `install.sh` → local user environment

Local-dev install (for contributors, not end-users; end-users use
`brew install --cask myna`). Touches:

| Side effect | Path | Code |
|---|---|---|
| Create venv | `~/.venvs/myna` | [`install.sh:14`](../install.sh#L14) |
| Editable install daemon | `~/.venvs/myna/bin/pip install -e daemon/` | [`install.sh:16`](../install.sh#L16) |
| Write default keybindings | `~/.config/myna/keybindings.json` | [`install.sh:19-28`](../install.sh#L19) |
| Symlink CLI | `~/.local/bin/myna` → `<repo>/cli/myna` | [`install.sh:31-33`](../install.sh#L31) |
| Copy Hammerspoon module | `~/.hammerspoon/myna.lua` | [`install.sh:36-39`](../install.sh#L36) |
| Merge CC Stop hook | `~/.claude/settings.json` (idempotent — checks for existing command match before appending) | [`install.sh:43-61`](../install.sh#L43) |
| Load LaunchAgents | `~/Library/LaunchAgents/dev.myna.{engine,daemon}.plist` | [`install.sh:64-72`](../install.sh#L64) |

**Idempotency requirement:** every step must be safe to re-run. Currently
the only non-idempotent risk is the CC hook merge — if
`~/.claude/settings.json` is malformed JSON, `json.loads()` throws and
the rest of the install (LaunchAgent load) is skipped. Hardening: wrap
the `loads` in try/except + warn → continue with empty dict. Flagged
in [`development-guide-ops.md`](./development-guide-ops.md) for v0.2.

### 2.9 `site` → external surfaces

The site is a pure static-export Next.js deploy. It does not call the
daemon or any external API at runtime. Outbound integrations are
limited to:

| Integration | Where | Type |
|---|---|---|
| GitHub Release downloads | Hero CTA, FAQ | `<a href>` link |
| GitHub Issues | "Vote for Windows", "Report bug" | `<a href>` link |
| GitHub repo star count | [`GitHubStar.tsx`](../site/components/GitHubStar.tsx) | server-side `fetch()` against the GitHub API (cached) — confirm in component |
| Vercel Analytics | None | Site is privacy-clean; no SDK |

## 3. Data flow walkthroughs

### 3.1 Speak the current selection (full)

The most common path. User presses `⌘⌥⇧S`.

```
1. macOS routes the hotkey event to whichever app last registered the
   chord. If the Swift app is running, KeyboardShortcuts catches it.
   If only Hammerspoon is running, hs.hotkey catches it.

2. HotkeyManager.swift (Swift) or hammerspoon/myna.lua (legacy) fires
   the SpeakSelection action.

3. SelectionService.swift simulates ⌘C with a CGEvent and waits 120 ms
   for the pasteboard to populate, then reads NSPasteboard.general.string.
   A `defer` block restores the prior pasteboard on every exit path
   (incl. Task cancellation).

4. Swift app POSTs to `http://127.0.0.1:8766/v2/synthesize` with
   {text, voice, speed, chunk_chars, …} as JSON. (Hammerspoon legacy
   path POSTs to /speak v1 instead.)

5. daemon/myna/app.py @app.post("/v2/synthesize"):
   - chunking.py splits the text into chunk-size-aware pieces
   - For each chunk, engine.py POSTs to mlx-audio /v1/audio/speech and
     receives WAV bytes
   - The chunk is yielded as one multipart body part with appropriate
     boundary markers
   - X-Chunk-Total-Estimate header is set up-front based on chunk count

6. Swift's SynthesizeStream.swift parses the multipart stream chunk by
   chunk. Each chunk is decoded into an AVAudioPCMBuffer (via temp-file
   roundtrip — AVAudioFile won't accept raw Data) and pushed onto
   PlaybackQueue.

7. AVAudioEngine renders the player → TimePitch (speed without pitch
   shift) → output node. PlaybackQueue maintains a virtual timeline so
   seek ±15 s and scrubbing work across chunk boundaries.

8. MenuBarController is concurrently polling /v2/status every 1.5 s
   and updating the menu bar state — bird icon animates while
   "speaking" is reported.

9. User can press ⌘⌥⇧Space (pause/resume), ⌘⌥⇧. (stop), or change
   speed in the menu — all routed through DaemonClient OR (for speed
   only) the local AVAudioEngine TimePitch unit.

10. When the stream completes (or fails mid-stream), the multipart
    boundary closes; Swift compares actual chunk count to
    X-Chunk-Total-Estimate. Mismatch → log + surface a soft error
    (current path: silent truncation with ok:true — see drift §1).
```

### 3.2 Summarize the current selection

Like 3.1, except:
- Hotkey is `⌘⌥⇧A` → `speak_selection_summary`
- Swift posts to `/v2/synthesize-summary` instead
- Daemon first calls `summarize.summarize(text, …)` against Ollama
  before chunking. If Ollama is unreachable, propagates as HTTP 500
  (flagged drift).

### 3.3 Read the current Chrome article

- Hotkey is `⌘⌥⇧R` → `read_chrome_article`
- `ChromeService.swift` runs an NSAppleScript `tell application "Google
  Chrome" to get URL of active tab of front window`, wrapped in
  `with timeout of 5 seconds` to prevent menu-bar hang on wedged
  Chrome.
- Swift app POSTs `{url: …}` to `/v2/extract`, gets `{ok: true, text}`,
  then POSTs that text to `/v2/synthesize`.
- daemon/myna/extract.py uses trafilatura to pull the article body
  (no JS execution, no proxy, just a clean fetch+extract).

### 3.4 Claude Code session announce

```
1. User has a Claude Code session open in another terminal/IDE.
2. Session completes; Claude Code fires its Stop hook chain.
3. hooks/myna-cc-announce.py receives the JSON event on stdin,
   constructs an /announce POST with session_id, label, text.
4. daemon/myna/registry.py Registry.add() stores it (FIFO with TTL).
5. Menu bar (Swift MenuBarController via /v2/status.registry or
   Hammerspoon via /registry) shows a pickable indicator.
6. User clicks the registry item; the app POSTs /play/{item_id}
   (v1) or the equivalent v2 path; the registered text is then
   spoken through the same synthesize pipeline as 3.1.
7. Critically: sessions DON'T auto-speak — the silent registry was the
   whole point of this design, post-v0 frustration with "all my
   parallel CC sessions are speaking at once".
```

### 3.5 Auto-update via Sparkle

```
1. UpdateController (Sources/Updates/UpdateController.swift) wraps a
   Sparkle SPUStandardUpdaterController. Configured in Info.plist:
     SUFeedURL = https://github.com/PrerakGada/myna/releases/download/
                 appcast/appcast.xml
     SUPublicEDKey = lEoEYOBRVnzZC9bysaAYSRpEuXSDmd/FagSmzv2ozHg=
     SUEnableAutomaticChecks = YES
     SUEnableInstallerLauncherService = YES

2. Sparkle daily checks SUFeedURL.
3. For each <item>, parses sparkle:edSignature attribute. Verifies the
   download with the public EdDSA key baked into the .app at build time.
4. If signature OK and version > installed CFBundleShortVersionString,
   prompts user to install. (User can also pull menu → Check for
   Updates… via UpdateController's CheckForUpdatesView.)
5. Sparkle downloads the DMG, mounts, copies .app, uses
   InstallerLauncherService for the privileged replace, relaunches.

Critical: SUPublicEDKey is frozen at install time. Rotating it means
every installed copy refuses all future updates. New users would get
the new key, but existing users would be stuck on whatever version
they had until they manually re-installed. See SECURITY.md and the
v0.2 follow-up in HANDOFF.md.
```

### 3.6 First-time end-user install via Homebrew

```
1. $ brew tap PrerakGada/tap
2. $ brew install --cask myna
   ├─ brew sees the cask depends on the formula `myna-daemon`
   ├─ brew installs myna-daemon (Python formula)
   │   ├─ depends_on "python@3.13" → install python@3.13 (~3 min)
   │   ├─ depends_on "rust" => :build → install rust (~6 min)
   │   ├─ For each of 40 declared `resource` blocks (fastapi, uvicorn,
   │   │  httpx, trafilatura, pydantic + pydantic_core, …): download
   │   │  sdist, pip-install (compiling Rust extensions for
   │   │  pydantic_core and watchfiles)
   │   └─ pip_install_and_link buildpath/"daemon"
   ├─ Cask downloads Myna-0.1.0.dmg from the GH release
   ├─ Verifies sha256
   ├─ Mounts, copies Myna.app to /Applications, ejects
   └─ Total: ≈ 20–30 min first time; bottle-cached thereafter

3. $ open /Applications/Myna.app
4. First launch: macOS Gatekeeper verifies Apple notarization (signature
   + staple), allows. The app prompts for Accessibility on the first
   hotkey usage and AppleScript on the first /v2/extract Chrome call.
```

## 4. Sequence diagrams (text form)

### 4.1 Swift app → daemon → Kokoro (synthesize stream)

```
User       Swift app          daemon                  Kokoro mlx-audio
 |              |                |                          |
 | press ⌘⌥⇧S  |                |                          |
 |─────────────►|                |                          |
 |              | Cmd+C sim      |                          |
 |              | + pasteboard   |                          |
 |              | read           |                          |
 |              |                |                          |
 |              | POST /v2/synthesize {text,voice,…}        |
 |              |───────────────►|                          |
 |              |                | chunking.py splits text  |
 |              |                | for each chunk:          |
 |              |                |  POST /v1/audio/speech   |
 |              |                |─────────────────────────►|
 |              |                |  WAV bytes               |
 |              |                |◄─────────────────────────|
 |              | multipart      |                          |
 |              | chunk (WAV)    |                          |
 |              |◄───────────────|                          |
 |              | decode→PCM     |                          |
 |              | enqueue        |                          |
 |              | AVAudioEngine  |                          |
 |              | renders audio  |                          |
 |◄─────────────|                |                          |
 |  hear audio  |                |                          |
 |              |                |    (repeat per chunk)    |
 |              |                |                          |
 |              | (end of stream — boundary closes)         |
 |              |◄───────────────|                          |
```

### 4.2 Release tag → published DMG

```
operator              GitHub Actions               Apple notary    Homebrew tap repo
   |                       |                            |                  |
   | git tag v0.1.0        |                            |                  |
   | git push --tags       |                            |                  |
   |──────────────────────►|                            |                  |
   |                       | preflight (check secrets)  |                  |
   |                       | build (xcodegen+xcodebuild)|                  |
   |                       |  archive Myna.app          |                  |
   |                       |  TAR THE .APP              |                  |
   |                       |  upload-artifact           |                  |
   |                       |                            |                  |
   |                       | sign job:                  |                  |
   |                       |  download+untar            |                  |
   |                       |  import .p12 to keychain   |                  |
   |                       |  codesign hardened-runtime |                  |
   |                       |   bottom-up Sparkle.framework                 |
   |                       |  TAR THE .APP              |                  |
   |                       |  upload-artifact           |                  |
   |                       |                            |                  |
   |                       | notarize job:              |                  |
   |                       |  xcrun notarytool submit ──┼─►(Apple wait)    |
   |                       |  poll until Accepted ◄─────┤                  |
   |                       |  stapler staple .app       |                  |
   |                       |  TAR + upload              |                  |
   |                       |                            |                  |
   |                       | dmg job: create-dmg        |                  |
   |                       | sign-dmg + notarize-dmg    |                  |
   |                       | release job: gh release    |                  |
   |                       |  create v0.1.0 + upload DMG|                  |
   |                       | appcast job:               |                  |
   |                       |  sign_update DMG (EdDSA)   |                  |
   |                       |  generate appcast.xml      |                  |
   |                       |  upload to `appcast` release                  |
   |                       | tap-bump job:              |                  |
   |                       |  ssh push url+sha256       |─────────────────►|
   |                       |                            |                  |
   |  ✓ green pipeline    |                            |                  |
   |◄──────────────────────|                            |                  |
   |                                                                       |
   | end users: `brew install --cask myna` now works against the new DMG   |
```

## 5. Cross-cutting concerns

### 5.1 Versioning

Each part is versioned independently:

| Part | Source of truth | Current | How it's bumped |
|---|---|---|---|
| `macos` | [`apps/macos/project.yml`](../apps/macos/project.yml) `MARKETING_VERSION` | `0.1.0` | hand-edit; flows into `Info.plist:CFBundleShortVersionString` via `$(MARKETING_VERSION)` substitution |
| `daemon` | [`daemon/myna/__init__.py`](../daemon/myna/__init__.py) `__version__` | `0.2.0` | hand-edit; also in [`pyproject.toml`](../daemon/pyproject.toml) (keep in sync) |
| `site` | [`site/package.json`](../site/package.json) `version` | `0.1.0` | not externally surfaced; track for changelog |
| `cli` | embedded in repo, no version of its own | n/a | versions with the repo |
| `tap` | embedded; updated by `tap-bump` job on each release | per release | automatic on tag push |
| Release tag | `git tag v*` | `v0.1.0` | what drives the whole pipeline |

The daemon shipping `0.2.0` while the release tag is `v0.1.0` is
intentional — the Swift app + release are at `0.1.0` while the daemon's
v2 API gave it an internal version bump.

### 5.2 Configuration sources

| Setting | Stored in | Owned by |
|---|---|---|
| Voice / speed / summary model / ports / Ollama URL / summary_think / summary_timeout | `~/.config/myna/config.json` | [`daemon/myna/config.py`](../daemon/myna/config.py) |
| Hotkey bindings | `~/.config/myna/keybindings.json` (written by [`install.sh:19-28`](../install.sh#L19); read by Hammerspoon legacy) **AND** UserDefaults via KeyboardShortcuts library (Swift app) | Two parallel stores — diverges silently. Flagged for v0.2. |
| Swift app per-tab UI state | `@AppStorage` (UserDefaults under `dev.myna.app` suite) | [`SettingsViewModel.swift`](../apps/macos/Sources/Settings/SettingsViewModel.swift) |
| Sparkle feed URL + public key | `apps/macos/Resources/Info.plist` (generated by XcodeGen from `project.yml`) | XcodeGen, baked in at build time — cannot change post-ship |
| Cache directory | `~/.cache/myna/{tmp/,logs/}` | mlx-audio + v1 `Player` (Python) |
| Log directory | `~/Library/Logs/myna-{engine,daemon}.log` (LaunchAgent StandardOutPath/StandardErrorPath) + `~/Library/Logs/Myna/myna.log` (Swift app OSLog mirror) | mixed |
| GH Actions secrets | GitHub repo secrets | operator |

### 5.3 Failure modes by integration

| If this breaks… | Then… |
|---|---|
| mlx-audio (Kokoro) is down | `/v2/health.engine_up = false`. /v2/synthesize returns 502 `engine_down`. UI shows engine-down indicator. App stays functional for non-TTS actions (Settings, etc.). |
| Ollama is down | `/v2/summarize` returns HTTP 500 (current — should be 502 `summary_engine_down`). Full-text speak still works; summary mode fails loudly. |
| Daemon is down | All v2/v1 endpoints unreachable. Swift app shows "daemon unreachable" badge in menu bar. CLI/Hammerspoon/CC-hook fail silently. Settings → Restart Daemon button issues `launchctl kickstart`. |
| Swift app crashes | Hammerspoon legacy still works (if user has both). All daemon-side state preserved. |
| Sparkle key rotation | Every installed copy refuses all future updates — irreversible without manual re-install. SECURITY.md mandates "never rotate this key after the first public release". |
| GH Actions secret missing | `release.yml`'s preflight job fails fast with the missing name. No partial release possible. |
| Apple notary outage | `notarize.sh` polls until timeout; release blocks. Manual fallback documented in [RELEASE.md § 4](../RELEASE.md#4-manual-notarization-fallback). |
| `actions/upload-artifact` flattens bundle | Symlinks + xattrs lost mid-pipeline → notarization rejects with "binary signature invalid". **Mitigation already in place: tar between every job.** Removing the tar = re-introducing the 10-iteration bug. |

### 5.4 Security boundaries

- All HTTP services bind `127.0.0.1` only — no LAN exposure.
- No auth on daemon endpoints (intentional — local-only). Implication:
  any local user can access them. Acceptable on a single-user Mac.
- Daemon does not `eval`, `exec`, or `shell=True`. No remote-code-execution
  surface from text input.
- Sparkle EdDSA signature is the chain of trust for updates. Public key
  in [`apps/macos/project.yml:60`](../apps/macos/project.yml#L60).
  Private key in 1Password and GH secret only.
- Apple Developer ID code signing + notarization is the chain of trust
  for the initial install (Gatekeeper verifies on first launch).
- Pasteboard restore on every Selection capture exit path (defer block)
  prevents accidental data exposure.
- Chrome AppleScript has a 5-second timeout to prevent menu-bar hang.

## 6. Operational hand-off matrix

If you change X, you must update Y:

| Change | Update |
|---|---|
| Add daemon endpoint | [`v2_types.py`](../daemon/myna/v2_types.py) Pydantic model + [`app.py`](../daemon/myna/app.py) handler + test + [`DaemonTypes.swift`](../apps/macos/Sources/Network/DaemonTypes.swift) Codable model + [`DaemonClient.swift`](../apps/macos/Sources/Network/DaemonClient.swift) method + Swift test + [`API_CONTRACT.md`](./native-app/API_CONTRACT.md) + [`api-contracts-daemon.md`](./api-contracts-daemon.md) |
| Change daemon port | [`config.py`](../daemon/myna/config.py) default + [`DaemonClient.swift`](../apps/macos/Sources/Network/DaemonClient.swift) baseURL + `MYNA_PORT` env handling in [`cli/myna`](../cli/myna) + [`hammerspoon/myna.lua`](../hammerspoon/myna.lua) + [`hooks/myna-cc-announce.py`](../hooks/myna-cc-announce.py) + [`launchagents/dev.myna.daemon.plist.template`](../launchagents/dev.myna.daemon.plist.template) |
| Add a hotkey action | `KeyboardShortcuts.Name` extension in Swift + `HotkeyManager.swift` registration + matching `~/.config/myna/keybindings.json` default in [`install.sh:19-28`](../install.sh#L19) + Hammerspoon `myna.lua` if v1 needs it + README shortcut table |
| Add a daemon dep | [`daemon/pyproject.toml`](../daemon/pyproject.toml) **AND** regenerate the deployed-tap formula resource blocks in `PrerakGada/homebrew-tap` (the source-of-truth [`tap/Formula/myna-daemon.rb`](../tap/Formula/myna-daemon.rb) here currently **lacks** the resource blocks — see HANDOFF.md "Tap formula tail" — reconcile before v0.2) |
| Add a Swift SPM dep | [`apps/macos/project.yml`](../apps/macos/project.yml) `packages:` + target `dependencies:` + `xcodegen generate` |
| Add a release-pipeline step | [`.github/workflows/release.yml`](../.github/workflows/release.yml) + matching shell script in [`dist/`](../dist/) + smoke test in [`dist/tests/test_scripts.sh`](../dist/tests/test_scripts.sh) + RELEASE.md walkthrough |
| Rotate Sparkle key | **DON'T.** If you must: every installed copy of Myna will refuse all future updates. Document a "manual re-install required" minor version. See [RELEASE.md § 1.4](../RELEASE.md#14-sparkle-eddsa-keys). |
| Change SUFeedURL | Update [`project.yml:59`](../apps/macos/project.yml#L59), regenerate Info.plist, **all existing installs continue pointing at the old URL forever** (it was baked in at build time) — ship a one-time migration release. |
| Change Sparkle public key flow | `project.yml:60` `SUPublicEDKey` + ensure `dist/appcast.sh` is signing with the matching private key |
| Add a marketing-site page | New file under `site/app/`, link from `site/components/Nav.tsx`, update `site/vercel.json` redirects if needed |

---
